data.title: ZAPTEST Assessed “Awardable” for Department of War Work in the CDAO’s Tradewinds Solutions Marketplace
data.description: ZAPTEST revealed today that their ZADS - AI Digital Soldiers - has been deemed "Awardable" and is now accessible to approved government users via the Tradewinds Solutions Marketplace by the Chief Digital and Artificial Intelligence Office. This platform provides Department of War mission entities and related professionals with access to competitively evaluated artificial intelligence, machine learning, digital, data, and analytics solutions.

data.title: Codexis Announces Pricing of Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: Codexis, Inc., a renowned provider of enzymatic solutions for manufacturing complex oligonucleotide therapeutics, has disclosed the pricing details of its recent underwritten public offering. The offering consists of 16,666,667 shares of common stock priced at $1.50 per share. After factoring in underwriting discounts, commissions, and estimated expenses, Codexis anticipates netting roughly $23.1 million from this endeavor. The offering is slated to conclude around July 27, 2026, pending usual closing procedures. Additionally, Codexis has allowed the underwriters a 30-day option to procure up to an extra 2,500,000 shares of common stock at the public offering rate, minus underwriting reductions and commissions.

data.title: The Finish Line that Changed China: Retracing the Long March to Yan'an
data.description: On July 23, 2026, a report from China.org.cn highlighted the significance of the Long March in China's history. The Long March led to Yan'an, marking the start of a new era. Over 90 years ago, a group of soldiers embarked on this journey. Today, China reflects on the impact of this event, underscoring its lasting importance in the country's narrative.
